Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: How is the moment as we leave the European Union to reunite our country and allow

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: the warmth and natural affection that we all share for our European neighbours to find

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: renewed expression in one great new national project of building a deep, special and

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: democratically accountable partnership with those nations we are proud to call our closest friends?

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: The bill ensures that the implementation period must end on the 31st of December next year with no possibility of

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: an extension and it paves the way for a new agreement on our future

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: relationship with our European neighbours based on an ambitious free trade

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: agreement. Our aim is to provide a close friendship between sovereign equals, to promote our common

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: interests, inspired by pride in our European heritage and civilization.

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: I am absolutely determined that this great project will not be the project of one government

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: or one party, but of the British nation as a whole.

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: So Parliament, so Parliament, as I have said,

Speaker: SPEAKER_00
Text: will be kept fully informed about the progress of these negotiations.
